query:
UPDATE panel_settings
            SET panel_port = ?,
                panel_base_path = ?,
                sub_enabled = ?,
                sub_host_override = ?,
                sub_link_host = ?,
                sub_update_interval_hours = ?,
                sub_brand_name = ?,
                sub_service_url = ?,
                sub_port = ?,
                xray_freedom_strategy = ?,
                xray_routing_strategy = ?,
                xray_test_url = ?,
                xray_block_bittorrent = ?,
                xray_blocked_ips = ?,
                xray_blocked_domains = ?,
                xray_ipv4_domains = ?,
                xray_custom_rules = ?,
                xray_rule_order = ?,
                panel_tls_enabled = ?,
                panel_tls_cert = ?,
                panel_tls_key = ?,
                sub_tls_mode = ?,
                sub_cert_pem = ?,
                sub_key_pem = ?,
                updated_at = datetime('now')
            WHERE id = 1
